arts.ttl: Carsley: Haven't applied for full-time England job
arts.sum: England interim manager Lee Carsley said he had not made a formal application to become their permanent boss and added that he felt privileged to be given the opportunity to manage the senior side.

arts.ttl: England to make changes for Finland Nations League showdown after Greece defeat
arts.sum: Lee Carsley reveals that he will likely revert back to a less experimental playstyle when England play Finland on Sunday after their Nations League loss against Greece.

arts.ttl: 4 ways to fix England's muddled attack
arts.sum: Even if these probing runs are not always picked out, the threat of a Premier League forward hurtling towards goal will naturally push Finland's backline deeper, teasing apart space in midfield which was so hard to come by against Greece. The Birmingham-born former Republic of Ireland international claimed that he was 'hopeful' of returning to the Under-21s before, a few seconds of garbled sentences later, describing the senior management role as "one of the best jobs in the world".

arts.sum: Bukayo Saka will not be involved when England take on Finland in Helsinki on Sunday evening, but he could be fit enough to play for Arsenal against Bournemouth next weekend

arts.ttl: Finland vs England: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: England suffered a bruising defeat to Greece in the UEFA Nations League on Thursday and will be aiming for redemption against Finland this Sunday in Helsinki. England have several absentees ahead of Sunday's encounter in the Finnish capital, with Bukayo Saka sustaining a hamstring injury in the defeat to Greece.
